# agentops_role (Resource)

An authorization role: a named grouping of policies that can be granted to holders.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_role" "deployer" {
  name        = "deployer"
  description = "Can deploy and manage agents"
  policy_ids  = [agentops_policy.deploy.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable role name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form role description.
- `policy_ids` (List of String) Identifiers of the policies attached to this role.

### Read-Only

- `builtin` (Boolean) Whether the role is built in and managed by the system.
- `holders` (Number) Number of holders currently granted this role.
- `id` (String) Role identifier.
